letter_excerpt: Not legal or medical advice. Draft assistance only. This is a draft for review by a person before filing. To Whom It May Concern at Aetna Behavioral Health Utilization Management: I am writing to politely appeal the denial of the prior authorization request for a 3 to 5 day inpatient medical detoxification admission for alcohol use disorder on behalf of a 49-year-old male patient. The determination date of your denial was May 19, 2026. Please note that we are submitting this written request within 180 days of the d...
